category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates changelogs using Conventional Commits; official GitHub README and UnJS package docs describe changelog generation, version bumping, release tags, and GitHub release sync.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is changelogen; official GitHub README and UnJS package page use changelogen.
docs_sources: Official UnJS package page is a dedicated documentation page; official GitHub README documents quick start, CLI usage, release commands, and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to GitHub, and the official GitHub repository is unjs/changelogen.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README/UnJS docs identify Conventional Commits changelog generation, release automation, configuration, and TypeScript implementation.
